title: Campaign Manager 360 Campaign
description: Schema for a Campaign Manager 360 campaign resource. Campaigns are the top-level organizational unit for advertising activities within Campaign Manager 360, grouping ads, placements, and creatives under a single advertiser with shared start and end dates, budgets, audience targeting, and delivery configurations. Campaigns belong to an advertiser within an account and define the overall parameters for a coordinated advertising effort.

id.description: Campaign ID. This is a read-only, auto-generated field assigned by Campaign Manager 360 when the campaign is created.

accountId.description: Account ID of this campaign. This is a read-only field inherited from the account context.

subaccountId.description: Subaccount ID of this campaign. This is a read-only field that can only be selected using the value set in the parent account.

advertiserId.description: Advertiser ID of this campaign. This is a required field on insert and identifies the advertiser that owns the campaign.

advertiserGroupId.description: Advertiser group ID of the associated advertiser. Advertiser groups allow organizing multiple advertisers for reporting and management purposes.

name.description: Name of this campaign. This is a required field and must be fewer than 512 characters long. Campaign names must be unique among campaigns of the same advertiser.

archived.description: Whether this campaign has been archived. Archived campaigns no longer serve ads but remain available for reporting.

startDate.description: Start date of this campaign. The date format is YYYY-MM-DD. This is a required field on insert and defines when the campaign begins serving ads.

endDate.description: End date of this campaign. The date format is YYYY-MM-DD. This is a required field on insert and must be on or after the start date. After this date, the campaign stops serving ads.

comment.description: Arbitrary comments about this campaign. Must be fewer than 256 characters long. Used for internal notes and documentation.

billingInvoiceCode.description: Billing invoice code included in the Campaign Manager 360 invoices associated with this campaign. Used for billing reconciliation.

defaultLandingPageId.description: Default landing page ID for this campaign. This landing page is used when no other landing page is specified for an ad within the campaign.

externalId.description: External ID for this campaign. Used to correlate the campaign with records in external systems such as order management or billing platforms.

audienceSegmentGroups.description: Audience segment groups assigned to this campaign. A maximum of 300 segment groups can be assigned. Audience segments define the users who are eligible to see ads from this campaign.

eventTagOverrides.description: Event tag overrides for this campaign. Event tags track user interactions such as impressions, clicks, and conversions.

creativeGroupIds.description: List of creative group IDs that are assigned to this campaign. Creative groups organize creatives for rotation and optimization.

additionalCreativeOptimizationConfigurat.description: Additional creative optimization configurations for this campaign. Each configuration defines how creatives are optimized for a specific set of activities.

euPoliticalAdsDeclaration.description: EU political advertising declaration for this campaign. Required for campaigns that serve political ads within European Union member states.

kind.description: Identifies what kind of resource this is. Value is always dfareporting#campaign.

createInfo.description: Information about the creation of this campaign, including the timestamp.

lastModifiedInfo.description: Information about the most recent modification of this campaign.

idDimensionValue.description: Dimension value for the ID of this campaign. Used for reporting queries.

advertiserIdDimensionValue.description: Dimension value for the advertiser ID of this campaign. Used for reporting queries.

AudienceSegmentGroup.description: An audience segment group containing one or more audience segments for targeting. Segment groups use AND logic between groups and OR logic within a group.

id.description: ID of this audience segment group.

name.description: Name of this audience segment group. Must be unique within the campaign.

audienceSegments.description: Audience segments assigned to this group. Users matching any segment within the group are eligible for targeting.

AudienceSegment.description: An individual audience segment used for targeting within a segment group.

allocation.description: Weight allocated to this segment, between 1 and 1000. Determines the proportion of traffic directed to this segment relative to other segments in the group.

EventTagOverride.description: Configuration to override an event tag's enabled status at the campaign level.

id.description: ID of the event tag that is overridden.

enabled.description: Whether this override enables or disables the event tag.

ClickThroughUrlSuffixProperties.description: Click-through URL suffix properties for the campaign. The suffix is appended to all click-through URLs served under this campaign.

clickThroughUrlSuffix.description: Click-through URL suffix to apply to all ads in this campaign. Used for tracking parameters.

overrideInheritedSuffix.description: Whether this campaign should override the inherited click-through URL suffix with its own defined suffix.

DefaultClickThroughEventTagProperties.description: Default click-through event tag properties for the campaign.

defaultClickThroughEventTagId.description: ID of the default click-through event tag for this campaign.

overrideInheritedEventTag.description: Whether this campaign overrides the inherited default click-through event tag with its own.

CreativeOptimizationConfiguration.description: Creative optimization configuration that defines how creatives are optimized for serving within the campaign.

id.description: ID of this creative optimization configuration.

name.description: Name of this creative optimization configuration.

optimizationActivitys.description: List of optimization activities associated with this configuration. Each activity defines a Floodlight activity used to measure optimization performance.

optimizationModel.description: Optimization model for this configuration. Determines which user actions are used to optimize creative delivery.

OptimizationActivity.description: An optimization activity that ties creative optimization to a Floodlight activity for performance measurement.

floodlightActivityId.description: Floodlight activity ID of this optimization activity.

weight.description: Weight associated with this optimization. Higher weights give more importance to this activity in optimization decisions.

AdBlockingConfiguration.description: Ad blocking configuration for a campaign. When enabled, a default ad can be served when the primary ad is blocked.

enabled.description: Whether this campaign has enabled ad blocking. When true, ad blocking is enabled for the campaign and a default ad can be served for blocked ads.

overrideClickThroughUrl.description: Override click-through URL to use when the default ad is served due to ad blocking.

MeasurementPartnerLink.description: Link to a third-party measurement partner for independent ad verification and viewability measurement.

measurementPartner.description: The measurement partner used for tag wrapping and verification.

linkStatus.description: The status of the measurement partner link.

partnerCampaignId.description: The partner-side campaign ID for correlating data between Campaign Manager 360 and the measurement partner.

time.description: Timestamp of the last change in milliseconds since epoch.

DimensionValue.description: A dimension value used for filtering and reporting in Campaign Manager 360.

id.description: The ID associated with the value.

matchType.description: Determines how the dimension value is matched.
